claim: Substantive claim establishing a dual-horizon archaeogenetic and historical lineage profile for Shane Jonathan Lozenich, derived from a high-density MyHeritage SNP microarray (~600,000+ markers) and project NG-25051 next-generation sequencing (NGS) target-capture libraries. Data integrity is verified by a Transition/Transversion (Ts/Tv) mutation ratio of 4.16, confirming high-quality, non-contaminated genomic structure.
